issues.summary: lib/data/models.dart is a God Module containing disparate domain models.
evidence: 651-line file containing models for basic data, KP system, divisional charts, dasha systems, and results.
issues.suggestion: Split into purpose-driven sub-modules (e.g., lib/data/models/kp.dart, lib/data/models/dasha.dart).

issues.summary: Complex triple-nested loops in dasha period calculations.
evidence: _computeManifestationPeriod and getCurrentDashas use deep loops (MD -> AD -> PD).
issues.suggestion: Flatten logic using search helpers or specialized collection types.

issues.summary: Production code vastly outweighs test code.
issues.suggestion: Implement a testing policy for core logic, especially for the complex Jyotish calculation services.

issues.summary: Inconsistent error handling (try-catch vs null-returns) across directories.
evidence: core/ uses mostly try-catch; services/ uses a mix of null-returns and try-catch.
issues.suggestion: Standardize on a consistent error strategy (e.g., Result types or consistent Exception usage) per layer.

issues.summary: Several core files reside in the root lib directory instead of categorized subdirectories.
evidence: High fan-in files like models.dart are in shallow directories beside deep ones.
issues.suggestion: Move root-level data and helper files into Categorized packages.
